productDisplayName: Puma Men Blue Driving Power Lo Shoes
description: Style NoteThese Driving Power Lo shoes from puma are a spin off from the high-top version and they're a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes are perfect for those who love a little show off drama in their casual ensembles. Product DetailsBlack shoe with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, overlays and decorative stitched detailingBranding on the tongue and heelPadded tongue and innerThick rubber outsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves, diamond shaped plastic inlay and branding on the midfoot Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
